title: nepeta hormozganica
intro: Nepeta hormozganica, also known as Hormozgan catmint, is a plant species that belongs to the mint family and is native to Iran. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities, which can be attributed to its essential oil composition. The health benefits of Nepeta hormozganica include its potential in treating digestive issues, reducing stress and anxiety, and alleviating symptoms of insomnia. The herbal preparations of this plant can be used in various forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are traditionally used in Iranian folk medicine.
